#  [Apache Flink 1.9.3 Released](</2020/04/24/apache-flink-1.9.3-released/>)

April 24, 2020 - Dian Fu [(@DianFu11)](<https://twitter.com/DianFu11>)

The Apache Flink community released the third bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.9 series.

This release includes 38 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.9.2. The list below includes a detailed list of all fixes and improvements.

We highly recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.9.3.

Updated Maven dependencies:


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.9.3</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.9.3</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.9.3</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](</downloads.html>).

List of resolved issues:

##  Sub-task

  * [[FLINK-15143](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15143>)] - Create document for FLIP-49 TM memory model and configuration guide
  * [[FLINK-16389](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16389>)] - Bump Kafka 0.10 to 0.10.2.2

##  Bug

  * [[FLINK-11193](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11193>)] - Rocksdb timer service factory configuration option is not settable per job
  * [[FLINK-14316](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-14316>)] - Stuck in "Job leader ... lost leadership" error
  * [[FLINK-14560](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-14560>)] - The value of taskmanager.memory.size in flink-conf.yaml is set to zero will cause taskmanager not to work
  * [[FLINK-15010](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15010>)] - Temp directories flink-netty-shuffle-* are not cleaned up
  * [[FLINK-15085](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15085>)] - HistoryServer dashboard config json out of sync
  * [[FLINK-15386](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15386>)] - SingleJobSubmittedJobGraphStore.putJobGraph has a logic error
  * [[FLINK-15575](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15575>)] - Azure Filesystem Shades Wrong Package "httpcomponents"
  * [[FLINK-15638](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15638>)] - releasing/create_release_branch.sh does not set version in flink-python/pyflink/version.py
  * [[FLINK-15812](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15812>)] - HistoryServer archiving is done in Dispatcher main thread
  * [[FLINK-15844](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15844>)] - Removal of JobWithJars.buildUserCodeClassLoader method without Configuration breaks backwards compatibility
  * [[FLINK-15863](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15863>)] - Fix docs stating that savepoints are relocatable
  * [[FLINK-16047](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16047>)] - Blink planner produces wrong aggregate results with state clean up
  * [[FLINK-16242](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16242>)] - BinaryGeneric serialization error cause checkpoint failure
  * [[FLINK-16308](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16308>)] - SQL connector download links are broken
  * [[FLINK-16373](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16373>)] - EmbeddedLeaderService: IllegalStateException: The RPC connection is already closed
  * [[FLINK-16573](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16573>)] - Kinesis consumer does not properly shutdown RecordFetcher threads
  * [[FLINK-16576](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16576>)] - State inconsistency on restore with memory state backends
  * [[FLINK-16696](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16696>)] - Savepoint trigger documentation is insufficient
  * [[FLINK-16703](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16703>)] - AkkaRpcActor state machine does not record transition to terminating state.
  * [[FLINK-16836](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16836>)] - Losing leadership does not clear rpc connection in JobManagerLeaderListener
  * [[FLINK-16860](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16860>)] - Failed to push filter into OrcTableSource when upgrading to 1.9.2
  * [[FLINK-16916](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16916>)] - The logic of NullableSerializer#copy is wrong
  * [[FLINK-17062](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-17062>)] - Fix the conversion from Java row type to Python row type

##  Improvement

  * [[FLINK-14278](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-14278>)] - Pass in ioExecutor into AbstractDispatcherResourceManagerComponentFactory
  * [[FLINK-15908](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15908>)] - Add description of support 'pip install' to 1.9.x documents
  * [[FLINK-15909](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15909>)] - Add PyPI release process into the subsequent release of 1.9.x
  * [[FLINK-15938](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-15938>)] - Idle state not cleaned in StreamingJoinOperator and StreamingSemiAntiJoinOperator
  * [[FLINK-16018](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16018>)] - Improve error reporting when submitting batch job (instead of AskTimeoutException)
  * [[FLINK-16031](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16031>)] - Improve the description in the README file of PyFlink 1.9.x
  * [[FLINK-16167](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16167>)] - Update documentation about python shell execution
  * [[FLINK-16280](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16280>)] - Fix sample code errors in the documentation about elasticsearch connector
  * [[FLINK-16697](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16697>)] - Disable JMX rebinding
  * [[FLINK-16862](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16862>)] - Remove example url in quickstarts
  * [[FLINK-16942](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16942>)] - ES 5 sink should allow users to select netty transport client

##  Task

  * [[FLINK-11767](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11767>)] - Introduce new TypeSerializerUpgradeTestBase, new PojoSerializerUpgradeTest
  * [[FLINK-16454](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-16454>)] - Update the copyright year in NOTICE files
